problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: The key to What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? is Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus — specifically Polymer crosslinking under — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
